findings.summary: Keyboard (155 components). Decoupling cap C6 double-counted on both +3V3 and +5V rails. Key matrix reports 78 switches on 5x15 matrix (75 positions) with 3 extra switches unexplained.

incorrect.description: Decoupling cap C6 double-counted - listed on both +3V3 and +5V rails
Key matrix reports 78 switches on 5x15 matrix (75 positions) - 3 extra switches unexplained

suggestions: Ensure decoupling caps are only counted on their actual rail
Validate key matrix switch count against matrix dimensions
